projectDescription: A Node.js WhatsApp bot that automatically transcribes voice messages using Whisper.cpp
keyFeatures: Automatic voice message transcription via Whisper.cpp
WhatsApp Web integration with QR code authentication
Configurable Whisper models and GPU support
publicApiSurface: USE_GPU - Enable GPU acceleration for Whisper
WHISPER_MODEL - Whisper model selection (tiny, base, small, medium, large)
WHISPER_LOCAL_MODEL_PATH - Path to local Whisper model file
TRANSCRIPTION_LANGUAGE - Language code for transcription (auto-detect or specific)
